code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:5000/api';export const fetchListings=async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};try{const response=await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/listings`,{params});return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching listings:',error);throw error;}};export const createListing=async listingData=>{try{const response=await axios.post(`${API_BASE_URL}/listings`,listingData);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error creating listing:',error);throw error;}};export const fetchUserProfile=async userId=>{try{const response=await axios.get(`${API_BASE_URL}/users/${userId}`);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching user profile:',error);throw error;}};export const formatPrice=price=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'USD'}).format(price);};
